title: Fix --complexity flag parsing in ci-parse step
description: The --complexity flag is not being parsed from issue comments by parse-inputs.js. When @kody --complexity low is used, the complexity parameter is ignored because the parser only handles --from and --feedback. This causes the pipeline to auto-detect complexity instead of using the override. Need to add --complexity parsing similar to existing --from and --feedback handlers in the same file.
existing_patterns: parse-inputs.js already parses --from and --feedback using parts[i] pattern with i+=2 advancement and outputs via output() function to GITHUB_OUTPUT
parse-inputs.js uses while loop to iterate through parts array checking for flag names
